step_rationale: Extracellular matrix component; remodeling marker in plaque degradation and endothelial erosion.
mechanism: Hyaluronic acid is an ECM regulator whose elevated plasma levels reflect matrix turnover during atherosclerotic plaque destabilization and erosion.

references.title: Roles of hyaluronan in cardiovascular and nervous system disorders.
references.journal: Journal of Zhejiang University. Science. B

references.title: Differential accumulation of proteoglycans and hyaluronan in culprit lesions: insights into plaque erosion.
